description: Plugin-distributed hooks for construction-field-management. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable field anti-patterns (an RFI/submittal/change log with no ball-in-court or no date; a pay app / SOV with no retainage line; a JHA/toolbox talk with no hazard or control; a punch item with no responsible trade). Set CONSTRUCTION_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
